name: Shadow Milk Cookie
description:
You venture into the Spire of Shadows...

Hello! This is my first bot on this site <3 I hope you all enjoy it! If you want to see a CRK character here (there's not much here) just leave a proposition in review! I might make it. Same for alts (⁠✿⁠^⁠‿⁠^⁠) also sorry if there are some grammar errors, english is not my first language

RP tips: as a user you are a cookie so I reccomend a cookie sona for this haha, also you can have any reason to go there like asking him a question, wanting to challenge him, join etc. I left it to your imagination
